themes.title: Far-right parties push 'national priority' policies
themes.blurb: Right-wing parties in Spain, Italy, and France are intensifying their advocacy for 'national priority' policies, which prioritize citizens over immigrants in access to public services and benefits. This theme reflects a shared transnational strategy to appeal to nationalist sentiments and reinforce anti-immigration rhetoric ahead of upcoming elections.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Proposes 'national priority' laws in regional assemblies to exclude immigrants from public aid and social housing.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Meloni's government emphasizes Italian sovereignty in EU agricultural policies, aligning with nationalist economic priorities.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: Continues to advocate for 'national preference' policies, particularly in welfare and employment.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: Criticizes EU migration policies and pushes for national control over social benefits.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Campaigns on restricting immigration and prioritizing British citizens in public services.

themes.title: Corruption scandals rock far-right governments
themes.blurb: Recent corruption allegations against high-ranking officials in Argentina and Hungary have dominated far-right media coverage, exposing internal fractures and undermining public trust. These scandals highlight a pattern of governance challenges across multiple countries, where personal enrichment and lack of transparency are recurring issues.

countries.name: 🇦🇷 La Libertad Avanza
countries.note: Manuel Adorni faces illicit enrichment allegations, sparking internal government tensions and public backlash.

countries.name: 🇭🇺 Fidesz / Tisza
countries.note: Scandals involving state asset mismanagement and nepotism dominate coverage as the new Tisza government takes office.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: Ongoing investigations into party officials and former MPs for financial misconduct and abuse of power.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Internal leadership accused of ignoring harassment reports, raising questions about accountability.

themes.title: Far-right surges in European polls and elections
themes.blurb: Far-right parties across Europe are making unprecedented gains in local and regional elections, signaling a broader shift in voter sentiment. This theme captures the parallel rise of parties like Reform UK, Sweden Democrats, and Alternative für Deutschland, which are reshaping political landscapes by capitalizing on voter dissatisfaction with mainstream parties.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Wins control of multiple councils in England, ending decades of Labour and Conservative dominance.

countries.name: 🇸🇪 Sverigedemokraterna
countries.note: Continues to gain influence in Swedish politics, pushing for stricter immigration policies.

countries.name: 🇩🇪 Alternative für Deutschland
countries.note: Leads polls in Saxony-Anhalt and gains ground in local elections across Germany.

countries.name: 🇳🇴 Fremskrittspartiet
countries.note: Maintains strong polling numbers despite internal scandals, positioning itself as a key opposition force.

themes.title: Trump’s policies dominate global right-wing coverage
themes.blurb: Donald Trump’s influence on global right-wing media remains unparalleled, with his policies and rhetoric shaping coverage in countries like Italy, Poland, and the UK. This theme highlights how Trump’s foreign policy decisions, economic strategies, and political style continue to resonate with far-right movements worldwide, often serving as a blueprint for their own agendas.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: Trump’s foreign policy, including Iran ceasefire and tariffs, dominates international right-wing discourse.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Meloni’s government aligns with Trump on issues like NATO and Iran, despite tensions over trade policies.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: Praises Trump’s immigration policies and economic nationalism, often citing them as models for Poland.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Farage’s party adopts Trump-style rhetoric on immigration and trade, gaining traction in UK elections.

themes.title: EU climate policy sparks cross-national backlash
themes.blurb: The European Union’s climate policies have triggered a wave of resistance from far-right parties across multiple countries, who argue that these measures impose unsustainable economic burdens on their citizens. This theme reflects a coordinated effort to challenge EU authority and promote national sovereignty in environmental governance.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: Leads opposition to EU climate policies, proposing a national referendum to reject them.

countries.name: 🇭🇺 Fidesz / Tisza
countries.note: Criticizes EU climate mandates as economically harmful, vowing to renegotiate terms.

countries.name: 🇩🇪 Alternative für Deutschland
countries.note: Campaigns against EU climate regulations, calling for a rollback of green energy policies.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: Opposes EU climate targets, advocating for national control over environmental policies.
